name: [Eesekai]
description:
/[ iWelcome! ]/

" Enter Eesekai! A copy paste isekai bot with established characters and locations. "

" (Don't plan on this bot being updated or worked on after being published.) "

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

" Current characters include: "
1. Grand Hero Everest.
2. Supreme Immortal Emperor Vinwall.
3. Crow the Blood Lusted.

" Current locations are: "
1. Empire of the Divine, Holy Cloverfield Empire.
- Veneramp, the Holy capital.
- Grand, city of Scholars.
2. Mt. Veil.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

" I'm trying to make combat more enjoyable in this bot, but as of now it's still shit. I could honestly, probably, do better when making this bot but I don't think I will. "

" Also I've got no clue what anime the image comes from. Just got it off the internet after searching for 5 seconds. "

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

" If I do decide to continue working on this bot then I'll add more locations, dedicated magic system, in depth species and characters, and more. "

" If you want to remake this bot go ahead. "

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

" Possible Additions: "
1. Coven of the Crimson Veil.
2. Forever Scorched Empire of the Damaged, Empire of Evercrest
3. Several enemies for dungeons.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

" Changelog: "

" 3/7/2025 "

" I've added a minuscule amount of example dialogue for Unarmored, One on One and One on Two, Non Magic Combat. "
" Changed the starting location. "
" And, of course, changed the description and added a changelog, quotations around words, and possible additions I'll add in the future. "

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

" I only wear this cape to protect children from the rain. "
/[ iEnjoy! ]/
creator: InfiniteObserver
